plugins.name: ai-engineering
plugins.description: 22 engineering skills across 3 tiers (Engineering, Security & Operations, Intelligence) that work standalone and get supercharged when you connect your tools. Every skill follows a shared contract (machine_output + skill graph) so outputs compose into a network.

plugins.name: ai-engineering-tools
plugins.description: Optional MCP tool backends for the ai-engineering skills. First spoke: code-graph blast radius (agent-context) for /code-review and /tech-debt. Install only if you want the tools; the skills work standalone.
